zh.Kitchenour, Beckley, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可貝可利
zh.Little Pashley, Ticehurst, Sussex, Engla: 英國英格蘭素可迪胡爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund de Passele於大約1270年出生在英國素可迪胡爾斯特時，他的父親Robert de Alderstede de Passele29歲，母親Sarah De Passele24歲。他於大約1289年與Maud de Kechenore在英國英格蘭素可貝可利結婚。他去世於1327年3月1日在英國素可享年58歲，埋葬在英國素可迪胡爾斯特。

zh-hans.Little Pashley, Ticehurst, Sussex, Engla: 英国英格兰素可迪胡爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund de Passele于大约1270年出生在英国素可迪胡爾斯特时，他的父亲Robert de Alderstede de Passele29岁，母亲Sarah De Passele24岁。他于大约1289年与Maud de Kechenore在英国英格兰素可貝可利结婚。他去世于1327年3月1日在英国素可享年58岁，埋葬在英国素可迪胡爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund de Passele was born about 1270, in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, his father, Robert de Alderstede de Passele, was 29 and his mother, Sarah De Passele, was 24. He married Maud de Kechenore about 1289, in Beckley, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 1 March 1327, in Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ticehurst, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund de Passele est né environ 1270, à Ticehurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Alderstede de Passele, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sarah De Passele, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Kechenore environ 1289, à Beckley, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1327, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Ticehurst, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund de Passele um 1270 in Ticehurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Alderstede de Passele 29 und seine Mutter Sarah De Passele 24. Er hat um 1289 in Beckley, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Maud de Kechenore geheiratet. Er starb am 1. März 1327 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Ticehurst, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund de Passele è nato il circa 1270 nel Ticehurst, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Robert de Alderstede de Passele, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sarah De Passele, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Kechenore circa 1289, nel Beckley, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 1 marzo 1327, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Ticehurst, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund de Passeleが約1270年にイギリススセックスティセハルストで生まれた時，父Robert de Alderstede de Passeleは29歳，母Sarah De Passeleは24歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリススセックスベックリーでMaud de Kechenoreと結婚した。彼は1327年3月1日にイギリススセックスで58歳で死去し，イギリススセックスティセハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund de Passele(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 수세스 티스후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Alderstede de Passele(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah De Passele(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벡리에서 Maud de Kechenore(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1327년 3월 1일 영국 수세스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 티스후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.1318/1319: de 9 de janeiro de 1318 a 8 de janeiro de 1320
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund de Passele nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Alderstede de Passele, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sarah De Passele, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Kechenore aproximadamente 1289, em Beckley, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1327, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund de Passele родился около 1270 г. в местности таисэурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Alderstede de Passele было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah De Passele, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Kechenore около 1289 г. в местности беккли, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 1 марта 1327 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности таисэурст, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Maud de Kechenore aproximadamente 1289, en Beckley, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1327, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra.
